administration.label: System administration
administration.description: Actions required for general administration of the system. Only trusted administrative users should have access to these actions.

is_administrator.label: Is administrator
is_administrator.description: Indicates user should not be subject to access control measures. Users with this action effectively have access to all other actions.

can_set_access_control.label: Set access control
can_set_access_control.description: Allow user to create, edit and delete user logins, roles and groups.

can_view_logs.label: View logs
can_view_logs.description: Allow user to view system logs

can_view_search_log.label: View search logs
can_view_search_log.description: Allow user to view search log

can_view_my_change_logs.label: View own change logs
can_view_my_change_logs.description: Allow user to view their own change logs in a global view

can_view_change_logs.label: View change logs
can_view_change_logs.description: Allow user to view all change logs in a global view

can_configure_user_interfaces.label: Configure user interfaces
can_configure_user_interfaces.description: Allow user to change user interface configuration

can_configure_metadata_elements.label: Configure metadata elements
can_configure_metadata_elements.description: Allow user to change metadata element configuration

can_configure_relationship_types.label: Configure relationship types

can_configure_bundle_mappings.label: Configure import/export mappings

can_view_configuration_check.description: Allow user to view configuration checks

can_manage_system_bundle_displays.description: Allow user to add, edit or remove advanced displays for all users

can_administrate_sets.label: Administrate sets
can_administrate_sets.description: Allow user view, edit and delete all sets regardless of ownership or access control

can_configure_data_dictionary.label: Configure data dictionary
can_configure_data_dictionary.description: Allow user to create, edit and delete data dictionary entries.

can_do_search_reindex.label: Initiate search reindexing
can_do_search_reindex.description: Allow user recreate system search indices

can_export_configuration.label: Export Configuration
can_export_configuration.description: Allow user to export system configuration

can_manage_user_sorts.label: Manage user sorts
can_manage_user_sorts.description: Allow user to manage user defined sort field combinations

can_use_plugin_tools.label: Use plugin tools
can_use_plugin_tools.description: Allow user to use tool plugins

can_view_non_local_system_statistics.description: Allow user to view statistics fetched from other systems on the system statistics dashboard

library.label: Library check out
library.description: Actions required for check out of library items. Only users to handle library-style check in/out should have access to these actions.

can_do_library_checkin.label: Do library check in
can_do_library_checkin.description: Indicates user is allowed to check in library items.

can_do_library_checkout.label: Do library check out
can_do_library_checkout.description: Indicates user is allowed to check out library items.

can_do_library_checkinout_for_anyone.description: Indicates user is allowed to check in/out library items for other users.

find.label: Searching and browsing

can_quicksearch.description: Allow user to use quicksearch interface to find items

service_api.label: JSON service API access (legacy)

can_use_json_find_service.label: Use JSON search service
can_use_json_find_service.description: Allow user to use JSON search service

can_use_json_item_service.label: Use JSON item service
can_use_json_item_service.description: Allow user to use JSON item service (used to get and modify detailed information about records.)

can_use_json_model_service.label: Use JSON model service
can_use_json_model_service.description: Allow user to use JSON model service (used to get detailed information about the metadata schema.)

can_use_json_browse_service.label: Use JSON browse service
can_use_json_browse_service.description: Allow user to use JSON browse service.

can_use_xml_config_updater.label: Use config updater service
can_use_xml_config_updater.description: Note that users with this permission can potentially destroy data in your system!

can_use_json_simple_service.label: Use JSON simple service
can_use_json_simple_service.description: Allow user to use JSON simple service.

can_use_json_replication_service.label: Use JSON replication service
can_use_json_replication_service.description: Allow user to use JSON replication service.

graphql_api.label: GraphQL API access
graphql_api.description: Actions allowing access and modification of content via GraphQL API.

can_use_graphql_services.label: Use GraphQL services
can_use_graphql_services.description: Allow user to use GraphQL services

can_access_configuration_files_via_graph.label: Allow access to configuration files via GraphQL services?
can_access_configuration_files_via_graph.description: Allow user to access configuration file values via GraphQL services and the configuration endpoint?

can_access_graphql_exists_search_service.label: Allow access to GraphQL exists search service?
can_access_graphql_exists_search_service.description: _(Allow user to access GraphQL "exists" search service? This service ignores item- and type-based access control when returning data for performance reasons and should be restricted to privileged users.)

can_truncate_tables_via_graphql.label: Allow truncation of entire tables via GraphQL services?
can_truncate_tables_via_graphql.description: Allow user to delete all data in any table via GraphQL services and the edit endpoint? This is primarily useful for debugging and development.

pawtucket_pref.label: Pawtucket Actions
pawtucket_pref.description: Actions allowing access, sharing and modification of content on the front-end interface.

can_not_login.label: Can NOT Login
can_not_login.description: Do not allow user to log into Pawtucket.

can_download_media.label: Can Download Media
can_download_media.description: Allow user to download high resolution media in Pawtucket.

can_share_via_email.label: Can Share Objects via Email
can_share_via_email.description: Allow user to share objects with other via email in Pawtucket.

can_share_via_facebook.label: Can Share Objects via Facebook
can_share_via_facebook.description: Allow user to share objects with other via email in Facebook.

can_do_library_self_checkin.label: Can do library self-check in
can_do_library_self_checkin.description: Indicates user is allowed to check in library items for themselves.

can_do_library_self_checkout.label: Can do library self-check out
can_do_library_self_checkout.description: Indicates user is allowed to check out library items for themselves.

can_edit_theme_page_content.label: Can edit site pages for theme
can_edit_theme_page_content.description: Indicates user is allowed to edit site pages displayed in the current theme.

can_edit_theme_global_values.label: Can edit global values for theme
can_edit_theme_global_values.description: Indicates user is allowed to edit global values displayed in the current theme.

pawtucket_content_management_pref.label: Pawtucket Content Management Actions
pawtucket_content_management_pref.description: Actions allowing modification of static content on the front-end interface.

can_duplicate_ca_site_pages.description: Allow user to use duplicate site pages
